blueprint_mismatch.description: RuntimeLoop._execute_tick() tick result schema violates P1-IF-07
blueprint_mismatch.expected: status in {completed, halted, no_output} with fields: tick_id, session_id, task_id, rendered_output, smp_id, csmp_id, classification, halt_reason
blueprint_mismatch.actual: status in {TICK_COMPLETE, TICK_FAILED} with fields: session_id, logos_agent_id, task, participants, mre_state, constraints_applied, ms_pipeline_invoked, error

blueprint_mismatch.expected: _process_task() loops up to max_ticks (50), checking for completed/halted status
blueprint_mismatch.actual: run() calls _execute_tick() once per task — no multi-tick lifecycle

blueprint_mismatch.description: Agent wrappers not wired to subsystems
blueprint_mismatch.expected: Agent constructors receive UWM, SCP, CSP, MTP, ARP references. _on_tick() delegates to subsystems
blueprint_mismatch.actual: Agent constructors take only (session_id, logos_agent_id). _on_tick() methods are stubs returning empty dicts

blueprint_mismatch.description: NexusFactory missing 3 of 4 required factory methods
RGE↔MSPC integration loop not wired in RuntimeLoop
blueprint_mismatch.expected: Tick sequence: constraint derivation → Nexus tick → topology handoff → MSPC tick → cleanup
blueprint_mismatch.actual: _execute_tick() calls only nexus.tick(). No constraint provider, no topology handoff, no MSPC execution, no topology clear

blueprint_mismatch.description: MRE adapter architecture differs from P4.2 spec
blueprint_mismatch.expected: ProductionMREAdapter creates one MeteredReasoningEnforcer PER participant
blueprint_mismatch.actual: MREAdapter wraps single shared MeteredReasoningEnforcer for all participants

blueprint_mismatch.description: No operational logging points in runtime modules
blueprint_mismatch.expected: 19 logging points across RuntimeLoop (8), Agent_Wrappers (3), SMP_Store (3), CSP_Canonical_Store (1), Nexus_Factory (1)
blueprint_mismatch.actual: No logger injection or log points visible in available code

blueprint_mismatch.expected: RuntimeLoop(startup_context=result, task_source=StdinTaskSource(), output_sink=StdoutOutputSink()). operational_logger closed in finally block. Catches RuntimeHalt specifically
blueprint_mismatch.actual: RuntimeLoop(startup_context=result) — no explicit TaskSource/OutputSink. Logger closed after try block, not in finally. Catches generic Exception

blueprint_mismatch.expected: Clean replacement of stubs with operational exports
blueprint_mismatch.actual: UWMContext, UWMStore, read(), write() each defined twice. Stubs coexist with operational code

blueprint_mismatch.expected: AA_Catalog integrated into UWM workflow for indexed AA lookup
blueprint_mismatch.actual: SMPStore manages its own _aas dict. AA_Catalog exists but is not used by SMPStore

deny_by_default.evidence: UWMReadAPI returns None for unrecognized roles. Agent wrappers have no inherent authority. NexusParticipant registration required before tick execution

fail_closed.evidence: RuntimeLoop._execute_tick() catches exceptions and returns failure result. AgentLifecycleManager raises LifecycleHalt. Boundary validators raise on violation. GAP: Cannot verify all try/except blocks across full codebase without filesystem access

no_implicit_authority_escalation.evidence: Agent wrappers delegate to tool libraries. No wrapper contains governance logic. LogosAgentParticipant distinguished from I1/I2/I3 in orchestration authority

no_audit_readback.evidence: No component reads from operational logger. SOP write-only design preserved

no_hidden_persistent_state.evidence: All runtime state is session-scoped. UWM, CSP stores are in-memory dicts. No file persistence in runtime modules

deterministic_tick_ordering.evidence: NexusFactory registers participants in sorted() order. RuntimeLoop._execute_tick() verifies sorted order matches initial registration. LP Nexus executes in sorted(participant_id) order

monotonic_classification_ladder.evidence: Classification_Tracker validate_transition() enforces monotonic ladder. SMPStore.promote_classification() delegates to validator. CanonicalSMPProducer produces only canonical state

append_only_aa_model.evidence: SMPStore.append_aa() appends to aa_hashes list. No AA removal method exists. Canonical SMP check enforced

smp_hash_integrity.evidence: SMPStore.create_smp() computes SHA-256 content_hash. CanonicalSMPProducer computes new content_hash covering source + AAs

no_print_in_governed_runtime.evidence: Requires full codebase grep. P4 Closure Lock asserts no_runtime_prints: true

no_bare_except.evidence: Requires full codebase grep. P4 Closure Lock asserts no_bare_except: true

suggested_remediations.description: Implement P3.1 SMP Pipeline integration wiring
suggested_remediations.details: This is the single largest gap. Without P3.1, the 7-tick cognitive lifecycle is non-functional. Requires: (1) Inject UWM/SCP/CSP/MTP/ARP into agent constructors via AgentLifecycleManager.activate(), (2) Implement LogosAgent SMP routing state machine, (3) Implement I1/I2/I3 _on_tick() with subsystem delegation, (4) Add _process_task() multi-tick loop to RuntimeLoop, (5) Add output extraction from smp_resolved projections

suggested_remediations.description: Fix RuntimeLoop tick result schema to P1-IF-07
suggested_remediations.details: Change _execute_tick() return dict to use status={completed, halted, no_output} and include all 9 required fields: tick_id, session_id, task_id, status, rendered_output, smp_id, csmp_id, classification, halt_reason

suggested_remediations.description: Complete NexusFactory with missing build methods
suggested_remediations.details: Add build_rge_adapter(), build_topology_provider(), build_mspc_pipeline() static methods per P1 §4.3
Implement M6C tick sequence in _execute_tick(): constraint derivation → nexus tick → RGE topology handoff → MSPC tick → topology clear

suggested_remediations.description: Fix MRE adapter to per-participant architecture
suggested_remediations.details: Replace single-MRE MREAdapter with ProductionMREAdapter that creates one MeteredReasoningEnforcer per participant. Add reset() and telemetry() methods per P4 §3.3
Remove duplicate UWMContext, UWMStore, read(), write() definitions. Either remove stubs entirely or replace with operational delegations

suggested_remediations.description: Add operational logging points per P4.5
suggested_remediations.details: Inject operational logger into RuntimeLoop, propagate to agent wrappers and UWM. Add 19 log points across RuntimeLoop (8), Agent_Wrappers (3), SMP_Store (3), CSP_Canonical_Store (1), Nexus_Factory (1)
Write locks for: P3.1, P3.2, P3.3 (DEFERRED), P3.4. Individual P4 sub-locks optional given P4 Closure Lock exists

suggested_remediations.scope: Modify SMP_Store.py or decide to deprecate AA_Catalog
suggested_remediations.details: AA_Catalog exists but is not used by SMPStore. Either wire it in or document its deferral
Pass explicit TaskSource/OutputSink. Use finally block for logger close. Consider catching RuntimeHalt specifically vs generic Exception. Remove duplicate _launch_gui() call

executive_summary.p1_foundation: P1 artifacts exist and are structurally correct at the file/class level. Phase locks are present. However, Runtime_Loop tick result schema is non-compliant with P1-IF-07, and NexusFactory is missing 3 of 4 required factory methods. P1 is directionally complete but has contract-level drift requiring remediation.
executive_summary.p2_subsystems: P2 irreducible minimum (P2.1 + P2.2 + P2.3) is COMPLETE with locks. UWM has code quality issues (duplicate definitions, orphaned AA_Catalog). P2.4, P2.5, P2.6 correctly deferred as non-blocking.
executive_summary.p3_integration: P3 is the PRIMARY BLOCKER. P3.1 (SMP Pipeline) is not implemented — agent wrappers are stubs, no multi-tick processing, no subsystem injection, no output extraction. P3.2 (RGE↔MSPC) is not wired. Without P3.1, V1 cannot process a task through the cognitive loop. This is the critical path item.
executive_summary.p4_hardening: P4 Closure Lock exists claiming completion of P4.2-P4.6. Boundary_Validators.py (P4.6) is confirmed compliant. MRE tightening (P4.2) is partially done but uses wrong adapter architecture. Logging coverage (P4.5) appears absent. P4.1 Test Suite cannot be verified per audit exclusions. The P4 Closure Lock may be premature given P3.1 is incomplete — P4 depends on P3.1 per spec.
executive_summary.critical_path: P3.1 SMP Pipeline → P3.2 RGE↔MSPC wiring → RuntimeLoop tick result fix → NexusFactory completion. Until P3.1 is complete, P4 hardening is testing against a non-functional pipeline.
